title: The Adventures of Rex and Rinty
writer: John Rathmell, Barney A. Sarecky, B. Reeves Eason
actors: Rex, Rin Tin Tin Jr., Kane Richmond
plot: A 12 episode serial starring Rex, the King of the Wild Horses and Rin-Tin-Tin, Jr. Rex is brought from the island of Sujan, where he is worshiped as a God-Horse, to the U.S. to be trained as a polo pony. He escapes, meets Rinty an...
